description: Cerebria Tech (Hello Dexter) is a B2B contact database built for sales lead generation and prospecting.
tagline: B2B contact data for lead generation
overview: Cerebria Tech (Hello Dexter) is a B2B contact database that helps sales teams find and build prospect lists for lead generation.
what_is: Cerebria Tech (Hello Dexter) is a B2B contact database aimed at sales lead generation. It helps teams find business contacts and build prospect lists for outreach.
It fits a go-to-market stack as a contact data source for prospecting and CRM enrichment, rather than as a full CRM or marketing automation platform.
